name: Crispy Coated Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cups finely crushed cracker, potato or corn chip crumbs (or any flavor such as sesame seed, cheddar cheese, nacho, barbecue, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs and seasonings on a sheet of wax paper.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg and milk; beat well.
3. Dip each chicken piece in the egg mixture, then coat evenly with the seasoned crumbs.
4. Place the coated chicken pieces on a microwave-safe roasting rack in a microwave-safe dish. Cover with a sheet of wax paper.
5. Microwave on MEDIUM-HIGH (70% power) for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is tender. Halfway through cooking time, rearrange the pieces but do not turn them over.
Makes: 4 servings.
